title: Easily take an entire YouTube playlist and turn it into high quality transcripts
summary: This repo understands that bulk YouTube transcription needs to be local-first (Whisper), GPU-accelerated (CUDA/faster-whisper), and playlist-aware.  It demonstrates the complete pipeline: YouTube URL -> audio download -> Whisper transcription -> NLP sentence splitting (SpaCy or regex) -> structured output (text/CSV/JSON with timestamps and confidence scores).
creator_view: This repo understands that bulk YouTube transcription needs to be local-first (Whisper), GPU-accelerated (CUDA/faster-whisper), and playlist-aware. It demonstrates the complete pipeline: YouTube URL -> audio download -> Whisper transcription -> NLP sentence splitting (SpaCy or regex) -> structured output (text/CSV/JSON with timestamps and confidence scores). The transcript reader HTML shows UX awareness beyond raw transcription. It's the practical, local-first complement to AWS Transcribe approaches — exactly the T27 reference for Whisper-based extraction.

repo.description: Easily take an entire YouTube playlist and turn it into high quality transcripts using Whisper.

QS-01_activity_recency.detail: Last push Feb 2025 (~14 months ago). 24 total commits.

QS-02_engagement.detail: 664 stars, 82 forks. Popular utility for its niche.

QS-03_archived_abandoned.detail: Not archived. Still getting stars (last updated Apr 2026). Functionally complete.

QS-17_fork_to_star.detail: 82/664 = 0.12. Lower fork ratio — people star but don't modify.
